page_fetch.snippet: <!DOCTYPE html><html lang="en-US"><head><title>Just a moment...</title><meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html; charset=UTF-8"><meta http-equiv="X-UA-Compatible" content="IE=Edge"><meta name="robots" content="noindex,nofollow"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1"><style>*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}html{line-height:1.15;-webkit-text-size-adjust:100%;color:#313131;font-family:system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,"Segoe UI",Roboto,"Helve

opening_move: I'm looking to get developer API access or a data feed for automated trade logging. Who do I speak with?

exchange.sent: Perfect. One 50k LucidDirect. Before I fund... Is this style well-suited to the LucidDirect payout structure?
exchange.reply: Your style fits LucidDirect well... biggest day under 20% of total profit... avoid trades under 5 seconds (50% rule).

exchange.sent: My style naturally runs 15-18% per day... trades are trend-following holds of minutes to hours. Does that sound like Im fully in the clear? I just want to hear a straight yes before I fund.
exchange.reply: Yes, that sounds fully in the clear for LucidDirect payouts. As long as your highest EOD profit day stays at or under 20% of total profit, youre good. 15-18% is already under the 20% limit.

confirmed_rules.consistency_limit: 20% max single day EOD / total profit
confirmed_rules.trade_duration: no flagging if <50% of profits from sub-5s trades
